prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 022
Filename: 022_grief.png
Purpose: The moment after devastating news.
Success Criteria: Eyes distant, breathing uneven, no theatrical anguish.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Chloe is absorbing grief internally before outward collapse.
Review Focus: Reject if grief becomes sobbing, horror, fashion sadness, melodrama, or identity drift.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical grief reference. Devastating news registered internally with excellent restraint.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
